description: Short combo clip smoke case for dense offensive interaction and optional embedded key-display observation.
expected_use_case: A short combo or punish sequence where actor-local and interaction segments should appear quickly without requiring verdict-heavy interpretation.

expected_invariants.description: Output passes the canonical video-analysis v0 schema.
Actor A local observations are present.
Actor B local observations are present.
Segment and evidence frame ranges stay ordered and inside clip bounds.
Segment, evidence, and derived-event identifiers are document-wide unique.
If derived events are present, each carries source_segment_ids.
Canonical output does not carry saved artifact path fields.

notes: Primary review target: how cleanly interaction boundaries can be segmented on real combo footage.
If the clip includes an embedded key-display overlay, note whether input_sequence_window is sufficient or whether kind expansion pressure appears.
Do not score combo validity, exact move IDs, or matchup verdicts as part of smoke pass/fail.
